title: The Flooding
description: Initiate a flooding with a simple command.
body:
The Flooding Mod lets you instantly flood your Minecraft world with customizable intensity and range.

Key Features:

Flooding Modes (flooding gamerule)

1 — Low Perf: High-altitude flood layer for dramatic effect.

2 — Mid Perf: Local cube flood around the player.

3 — Crazy Perf: Massive world-spanning flood within the chosen distance — very heavy on performance.

Flood Distance (flood_distance gamerule): Limit the affected chunks around the player.

Examples:

activation command example: /gamerule flooding (insert flooding mode)
flooding distance command example: /gamerule flooding_distance (insert chunk size)
